title: Senior AI/BI Platform & Data Architect
summary: Senior Data & Platform Architect with 16 years of consulting experience in Life Sciences. I specialize in designing Snowflake, Databricks, and Azure-based GenAI solutions, building scalable medallion architectures and reusable accelerators. I created AI-enabled data products used across 60+ countries and 2,000+ users. Strong experience bridging business requirements with technical design, leading technical teams, and mentoring architects to accelerate delivery and improve data quality.

experiences.summary: Designing and delivering enterprise data architecture and GenAI solutions for global healthcare clients across 60+ countries with 2,000+ users, leading 15+ developers and mentoring junior architects.
experiences.details:
Led high-impact technical initiatives including enterprise-scale data platforms, GenAI solutions, and team mentorship:

* GenAI Medical Chatbot: End-to-end technical solution design using Azure OpenAI (gpt-4) for 3 countries and 200+ healthcare professionals, featuring cloud-native architecture with Application Gateway, Azure Container Apps, RAG with Azure Search, and managed vnets.

* Accelerators Marketplace: Designed LLM-assisted code generation templates, LLM gateways, Docker hosting, and GitLab CI/CD pipeline accelerating team delivery by 80%.

* Data Management Engineering Tool: Implemented comprehensive Python-based tool handling data profiling, schema generation, integrity checks, multi-stack ingestion, metadata lineage tracking, and GenAI exploration, reducing project delivery time by 60%.

* Commercial Data Hub: Architected fully integrated reporting platform for Salesforce Effectiveness supporting 60 countries, multiple sales lines, and 2,000+ data consumers with trusted data foundation.

* Mentored 2 junior architects and led technical teams of up to 15 developers.
achievements: Built Snowflake and Databricks accelerators reused in 15+ projects reducing ingestion/transformation time by ~25%
Architected enterprise commercial data hub for 60 countries and 2,000+ users integrating Veeva/SAP/market sales with Snowflake Share
Delivered GenAI medical chatbot for 200+ Healthcare Professionals in 3 countries using Azure OpenAI
Created LLM-assisted code generation framework accelerating teams by 60%
Lead technical teams of up to 15 developers and mentored 2 junior architects

experiences.summary: Data architecture, designed and implemented centralized data model and accelerators, with data quality checks and cross-country harmonization for global healthcare clients.
Designed and implemented Salesforce Effectiveness dashboards and data harmonization systems for multiple international customers.
experiences.details:
Developed enterprise data solutions and dashboards for pharmaceutical and healthcare organizations:

* Salesforce Effectiveness Dashboards: Designed and implemented cross-country harmonization solutions (Veeva CRM, market sales) in Power BI and Tableau for multiple customers.

* Data Harmonization System: Created standardized and reusable medallion data model, ETL pipelines, and master data development using Microsoft SSIS and SQL Server Master Data Services.

* International Market Analysis: Built reporting systems for multiple customers supporting diverse business requirements and data sources.
achievements: Delivered Salesforce Effectiveness solutions for multiple international customers
Created standardized medallion data model reused across multiple engagements

experiences.summary: Designed and implemented Salesforce Effectiveness dashboards and data harmonization systems for multiple international customers.

achievements: Centralized ETL control and observability system, reducing Operation team workload by 80%
Resource forecasting tool speeding up projects staffing by 40%

experiences.summary: Delivered multiple projects for diverse industries including Banking, Avionics, General Industry, and Education using various technology stacks.
experiences.details:
Gained foundational experience across multiple technology domains and industries:

* Project Delivery: Completed multiple projects for Banks, Schools, Avionics companies, and general industries.

* Technology Stack Exposure: Worked with Java EE, .NET, Qt/C++, and Windows CE platforms.

* Full-cycle Development: Participated in requirements gathering, development, testing, and deployment phases.
achievements: Delivered multiple projects across diverse technology stacks
Worked with Fortune 500 companies in Banking and Avionics sectors
Gained broad technical experience in Java, .NET, and C++

skills.name: Databricks
skills.details: Proficient in Databricks Adaptive Query Execution (AQE), Auto-loader for incremental ingestion, and Delta Live Tables (DLT) for production-grade data pipelines. Experience designing and implementing medallion architectures on Databricks.

skills.name: Snowflake
skills.details: Advanced expertise in Snowflake architecture, Semantic models, data staging, and Snowflake Share for secure data sharing. Designed and implemented enterprise-scale Snowflake data warehouses.

skills.name: SQL & Data Patterns
skills.details: Expert-level SQL proficiency with best practices and standard patterns including SCD (Slowly Changing Dimensions), CDC (Change Data Capture), and optimized query design.

skills.name: Azure Cloud
skills.details: Strong experience with Azure cloud-native architectures including Azure Container Apps (ACA), virtual networks, Azure OpenAI integration, and Azure AI Foundry.

skills.name: AWS
skills.details: Basic experience with AWS services including EC2, S3, Lambda, and RDS. Familiar with AWS data services and cloud architecture principles.

skills.name: Python
skills.details: Proficient in Python for data engineering, automation, and data management tools. Strong bash scripting for infrastructure automation and DevOps workflows.

skills.name: Bash
skills.details: Advanced bash scripting for Linux server administration, automation, and DevOps workflows. Expertise in shell scripting best practices and performance optimization.

skills.name: Linux & Containerization
skills.details: Advanced Linux server administration, Docker containerization, networking, and hosting platforms.

skills.name: CI/CD & IaC
skills.details: Expertise in GitLab CI/CD, DevOps toolkit, and infrastructure-as-code principles.

skills.name: Business Intelligence
skills.details: Experienced with Power BI and Tableau for enterprise analytics and self-service business intelligence. Designed dashboards for executive and operational audiences.

skills.name: Generative AI
skills.details: Expertise in Azure OpenAI integration, prompt engineering, and RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) architectures. Created LLM-assisted code generation frameworks.

skills.name: ETL & Data Integration
skills.details: Expert in designing and implementing complex ETL pipelines using SSIS, dbt, Informatica, and Spark. Proficient in automated data mapping and transformation.

skills.name: Enterprise Architecture
skills.details: Advanced experience designing enterprise-scale data platforms supporting thousands of users across multiple countries. Expertise in medallion architecture and data governance.
